name: Chemical Mixture Entry with Component Breakdown
description:
You are completing an annual Tier II report. Open EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. First, create a new facility record named 'Precision Metalworks Inc.' (you may use dummy data for the address and contacts, just ensure the name is correct). 

Then, navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add a new chemical entry with the following details:
- Trade Name / Chemical Name: 'CoolCut Pro 5000 Metalworking Fluid'
- Mark the entry as a Mixture (NOT a pure chemical)
- EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance): No

Add the following individual component chemicals to the mixture:
1. Mineral oil (petroleum) | CAS: 8012-95-1 | Weight: 45%
2. Diethanolamine | CAS: 111-42-2 | Weight: 8%
3. Sodium nitrite | CAS: 7632-00-0 | Weight: 3%

Hazard Classifications:
- Health Hazards: Check 'Acute (immediate)' and 'Chronic (delayed)'
- Physical Hazards: Leave all unchecked

Inventory Information:
- Maximum Daily Amount: 15,000 lbs
- Average Daily Amount: 10,000 lbs
- Number of Days On-Site: 365

Storage Information (add one location):
- Storage Type: Above ground tank
- Temperature: Ambient
- Pressure: Ambient pressure
- Location Description: 'Building C - Machine Shop Tank Farm'

After entering all information, save the chemical entry. Finally, export the entire submission using File > Create Submission, and save it exactly to: C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\mixture_chemical_entry.t2s
